candidate_a.title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
candidate_a.core_concept: Personalized coffee selection based on individual sensitivity to acidity.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A subscription service that curates beans known for low-acidity profiles and provides a simple pH test kit for users to track their own reactions.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot using existing low-acid bean varieties and a basic pH strip kit to gather subjective feedback. | Source 3 known low-acid coffee varieties.; Recruit 10 participants with known sensitivities.; Distribute coffee and pH test strips for a 2-week trial.

candidate_b.title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Sub-sampling subscription offering batch-certified low-acid coffee beans screened for standardized PH levels
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A pH-measuring toolkit distributed to participants to gather subjective reaction data vs objectively measured laboratory acidity

candidate_a.title: High-Efficiency Batch Prep Lockers
candidate_a.target_user: Early-career shift workers in transit corridors
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: No time to properly nutritious pre-prepped daily sustenance between rigid shift boundaries
candidate_a.core_concept: Automated kiosk network stocked by local morning-prep professional chef kitchens
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Time-sensitive temperature kiosks near train hubs that enable rapid mobile code retrieval of bulk caloric daily prep portions
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Deployment of three climate controlled modular locker cabinets dispensing pre-prepped heat-or-eat nutritious vegetable pods near a single bus hub

candidate_b.title: High-Efficiency Batch Prep Lockers
candidate_b.target_user: Early-career shift workers in transit corridors
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: No time to properly nutritious pre-prepped daily sustenance between rigid shift boundaries
candidate_b.core_concept: Convenient pickup of pre-prepped meals for shift workers.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A scheduled pickup service for pre-prepped meals at transit hubs.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Coordinate 3 pickup points at a transit hub where users collect pre-ordered meals from a staff member. | Partner with a local kitchen; Recruit 10 shift workers; Execute 3 days of pickups; Gather feedback on convenience

candidate_a.title: Arboretum Architect
candidate_a.target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
candidate_a.core_concept: Slow-paced horticultural design where trees grow in real-time synchronization with sunlight exposure in the player's zip code.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Integrate local meteorological and astronomical APIs to dictate plant growth patterns, incentivizing small adjustments to virtual plots throughout the day.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Single desert garden biome where user can plant one cactus and observe sun-path light-tracking simulations over a 48-hour period.

candidate_b.title: Arboretum Architect
candidate_b.target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
candidate_b.core_concept: Slow-paced, nature-focused horticultural design that evolves based on external environmental data.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A slow-paced gardening game where plant growth is simulated based on a pre-defined 'sunlight schedule' that mimics local day/night cycles, allowing users to check in on their virtual garden at their own pace.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A single-biome garden app where one cactus grows over 48 hours based on a static, simulated light-tracking algorithm. | Develop basic 3D model of a cactus; Implement a 48-hour growth state machine; Create a UI that displays current 'sunlight' status based on local time

candidate_a.title: BotanicTrack
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking plant growth performance compared to recommended care
candidate_a.core_concept: Visualization-heavy comparison interface between 'optimal' vs. 'attained' progress steps
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Data-heavy tracking focused solely on height metrics over fixed duration time intervals
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Form fields for recording plant dimensions weekly, displaying line graphs against ideal biological grow trajectories

candidate_b.title: BotanicTrack
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty tracking plant growth performance compared to recommended care
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A simple tracker where users log plant height and see their own progress over time.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A form to log height and a line graph to visualize it. | Build a log form; Implement a charting library; Display the user's own data

candidate_a.title: Community Moderation Firewall
candidate_a.target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Managing community quality during organic spikes of paid users joining chat rooms
candidate_a.core_concept: Threshold filtering allowing new user interactions after passing specific introductory checklist requirements
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Gated room architecture that auto-clears users as members provide identity verification/intro requirements
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Set of manual invite workflow gate protocols installed for three specific private Discord communities

candidate_b.title: Community Moderation Firewall
candidate_b.target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Managing community quality during organic spikes of paid users joining chat rooms
candidate_b.core_concept: Gated community entry based on checklist requirements.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A service providing manual moderation and gated entry protocols for private communities to ensure quality.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Manual invite workflow gate protocols for 3 Discord communities. | Define entry checklist.; Implement manual gate protocols.; Test with 3 communities.; Gather feedback.
